title: JiraIntegrationRequest
description: JiraIntegrationRequest schema from Palo Alto Networks SaaS Security Posture Management API

jira_url.description: Base URL of the Jira server or cloud instance.

project_key.description: Jira project key where tickets will be created.

issue_type.description: Jira issue type (e.g., Bug, Task, Story).

email.description: Email address associated with the Jira API token.

severity_mapping.description: Mapping from SSPM severity levels to Jira priorities.
